Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aion Sea]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Aion Sea is a body of water that can be sailed by an Imperial Navigator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Aion Sea is a body of water that the Guild's Navigators are capable of crossing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Aion Sea is a body of water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Aion Sea contains dangers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Calder suspects Naberius Clayborn will be taken a mile under the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — The Aion Sea is a haunted ocean containing many monsters and phantoms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Aion is a blue expanse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — The Aion Sea is haunted by monsters.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Aion Sea was created by Nakothi's death-throes.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — The Aion Sea is a location mentioned in the Navigator’s Guild report on Sleepless activity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — The Aion Sea is a location Jerri was eager to see.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — The Aion Sea requires quick decision-making and action.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Aion Sea is a location where Calder's body might end up if he deals with the Head of the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Aion Sea is a location at the heart of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Calder spent ten years in the Navigators crossing the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — The Aion Sea is a body of water where Navigators are required for business.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder has spent the past five years sailing the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The Cinderbeast is a terror from the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — The Aion Sea is currently a direction away from the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Foster would throw himself into the Aion Sea rather than let an Elder tell him what to do.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Testament sailed through the center of the Aion Sea.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — The island is located at the edge of the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The colors of the Aion Sea are green and blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor once dragged a massive shark out of the Aion Sea.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Kell’arack was nailed to the floor of the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — The Aion Sea contains a nameless island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — The Aion Sea is a body of water where things are thrown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Navigators are the only ones who can catch people on the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — A source of bright, hopeful Intent drifts around the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Aion Sea is a location where Loreli is.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — A deeper, darker shadow rose from the depths of the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri rose from the Aion Sea.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Aion Sea is a location where Kelarac was nailed to the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Aion Sea is a body of water where the shallow area has rare Elder activity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera could see from the Imperial Palace courtyard to miles deep in the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Jyrine’s body rose from the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Heart of Nakothi was kicked into the Aion Sea.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
